mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, CASE MN_PAGEDIV_C WHEN 'SC_HFAIU' THEN MN_FORWARD_URL ELSE MN_URL END MN_REAL_URL FROM s_menu_manager A
LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority_roll UAR ON UAR.MN_KEYNO = A.MN_KEYNO
WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_SHOW_YN = 'Y'
AND UAR.UIA_KEYNO = #{UIA_KEYNO} AND UAR.UIR_KEYNO = 'UIR_0000000013'
AND MN_HOMEDIV_C = (SELECT MN_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_URL = #{MN_URL} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N') ORDER BY MN_LEV,MN_ORDER
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND MN_PAGEDIV_C != 'SC_QXCFB' ORDER BY MN_ORDER

SELECT LISTAGG(ID,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ID) MN_MAINKEYS , LISTAGG(MN_NAME,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ID) MN_MAINNAMES FROM ( SELECT MN_KEYNO AS ID , MN_MAINKEY , MN_NAME FROM s_menu_manager START WITH MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' CONNECT BY PRIOR MN_MAINKEY = MN_KEYNO ) A

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}
ORDER BY MN_ORDER ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}
ORDER BY MN_ORDER ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND HM_TILES = #{HM_TILES}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND HM_SITE_PATH = #{HM_SITE_PATH}
mapper.update:
UPDATE s_menu_manager SET ${colunm} = #{value}, MN_MODNM = #{MN_MODNM} , MN_MODDT = SYSDATE
WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}

UPDATE s_menu_manager SET MN_DEL_YN = 'Y', MN_MODNM = #{MN_MODNM} , MN_DELDT = SYSDATE
WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}
UPDATE s_menu_manager SET MN_DEL_YN = 'Y', MN_MODDT = SYSDATE WHERE MN_URL = #{MN_URL} OR MN_URL LIKE NVL2(#{MN_URL}, #{MN_URL}||'/'||'%','')
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT UI_NAME FROM u_userinfo WHERE A.MN_MODNM = UI_KEYNO ) MN_MODNM ,(SELECT UI_NAME FROM u_userinfo WHERE A.MN_REGNM = UI_KEYNO ) MN_REGNM , A.* , DM.DN_HOMEDIV_C, DU.DU_KEYNO, DU.DU_NAME, DU.DU_TEL FROM ( SELECT mn1.* , mn2.MN_NAME HIGH_MN_NAME , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM s_menu_manager WHERE mn1.MN_KEYNO = MN_MAINKEY AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N') MN_CHILD_CNT , T.TC_TYPE MN_TOUR_CATEGORY FROM s_menu_manager mn1 LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager mn2 ON mn1.MN_MAINKEY = mn2.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_tourism_common T ON mn1.MN_TOURKEY = T.TC_KEYNO WHERE mn1.MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO} ) A LEFT JOIN t_department_user_manager DU ON A.MN_DU_KEYNO = DU.DU_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_department_manager DM ON DU.DU_DN_KEYNO = DM.DN_KEYNO

SELECT MN_NAME, MN_KEYNO, MN_BT_KEYNO, BT.BT_CODEKEY AS BTCODEKEY FROM s_menu_manager MN, B_BOARD_TYPE BT WHERE MN.MN_BT_KEYNO = BT.BT_KEYNO AND BT.BT_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN.MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN.MN_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE s_menu_manager SET MN_URL = REPLACE(MN_URL,NVL2(#{MN_beforeURL},#{MN_beforeURL}||'/',''),NVL2(#{MN_URL},#{MN_URL}||'/','')), MN_FORWARD_URL = REPLACE(MN_FORWARD_URL,NVL2(#{MN_beforeURL},#{MN_beforeURL}||'/',''),NVL2(#{MN_URL},#{MN_URL}||'/','')) WHERE MN_URL LIKE NVL2(#{MN_beforeURL},#{MN_beforeURL}||'/%','') AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select:
-- LOG OFF
SELECT tmm.* FROM s_home_manager tmm WHERE HM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = (SELECT MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_URL = #{MN_URL} )
SELECT A.* FROM s_menu_manager A WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND MN_MAINKEY = ( SELECT MN_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_URL = #{MN_URL} ) ORDER BY MN_ORDER

SELECT A.*,B.* FROM ( SELECT H.MN_NAME DEPTH0, H.MN_URL URL0
, C${model.index}.MN_KEYNO KEY${model.index}, C${model.index}.MN_NAME DEPTH${model.index}, C${model.index}.MN_ORDER ORDER${model.index}, C${model.index}.MN_URL URL${model.index}
, CASE
WHEN C${model.reverse}.MN_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN C${model.reverse}.MN_KEYNO
ELSE H.MN_KEYNO END KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager H
LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager C${model.index} ON
H.MN_KEYNO
C${model.index-1}.MN_KEYNO
= C${model.index}.MN_MAINKEY AND C${model.index}.MN_DEL_YN = 'N'
WHERE H.MN_KEYNO = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} ) A, S_MENU_MANAGER B WHERE A.KEYNO = B.MN_KEYNO ORDER BY
ORDER${model.index}
SELECT MN_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND (trim(MN_MAINKEY) IS NOT NULL)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND (trim(MN_MAINKEY) IS NOT NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(XH_REGDT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REGDT, XH.*, FS.FS_ORINM FROM t_xml_history XH LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON XH.XH_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE XH_MN_KEYNO = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND XH_DELYN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT CONCAT(#{DOMAIN}, (NVL2(REPLACE(MN_FORWARD_URL, ' ', null), MN_FORWARD_URL, MN_URL))) AS "loc" , TO_CHAR((NVL(MN_MODDT, MN_REGDT)), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "lastmon" , MN_CHANGE_FREQ AS "changefreq" , MN_PRIORITY AS "priority" , MN_HOMEDIV_C , MN_LEV , MN_ORDER , MN_PAGEDIV_C FROM s_menu_manager
WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C not in (SELECT MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_URL = '/dyAdmin')
WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C}
AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_PAGEDIV_C != 'SC_HFAIU' AND (MN_URL LIKE '%.do'OR MN_FORWARD_URL LIKE '%.do') ORDER BY MN_HOMEDIV_C asc, MN_LEV asc, MN_ORDER asc
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_MAINKEY = #{MN_KEYNO} AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND MN_PAGEDIV_C = #{MN_PAGEDIV_C}
SELECT MN_NAME FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = ( SELECT MN_MAINKEY FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO} ) AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_MAINKEY = ( SELECT MN_MAINKEY FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y' ) AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT NVL((SELECT MN_NAME FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = MN.MN_MAINKEY AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N'),'최상위메뉴') MAINNAME , MN_KEYNO , MN_NAME , MN_URL , MN_MAINKEY , MN_LEV , MN_ORDER , MN_PAGEDIV_C FROM s_menu_manager MN WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND MN_PAGEDIV_C = #{MN_PAGEDIV_C} AND MN_URL NOT LIKE #{MN_URL}||'%' AND MN_URL != #{MN_URL} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY MN_LEV, MN_ORDER
SELECT NVL(MAX(MN_ORDER), 0) + 1 FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_MAINKEY = #{dethSubMenuKey} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE s_menu_manager SET MN_URL = REPLACE(MN_URL, #{MN_beforeURL}, #{dethChUrl}) ,MN_LEV = MN_LEV - (#{dethInterval}) WHERE MN_URL != #{MN_beforeURL} AND MN_URL LIKE #{MN_beforeURL}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)

SELECT SMT_KEYNO , 'SMT'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(SMT_KEYNO,-10)) KEYNO , TO_CHAR(SMT_REGDT,'YYYY-MM-dd') SMT_REGDT , NVL(U.UI_REP_NAME,SMT_REGNM) SMT_UI_NAME , SMT_FORM , SMT_SUBJECT FROM s_menu_template B LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON B.SMT_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO WHERE SMT_DELYN = 'N'
AND SMT_KEYNO = #{SMT_KEYNO}
SELECT SMT_KEYNO, SMT_FORM, 'FORM'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(SMT_KEYNO,-10)) FORM_NAME, SMT_SUBJECT FROM s_menu_template WHERE SMT_DELYN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_MAINKEY} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_LEV != 0 ORDER BY MN_LEV
SELECT MN_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C != #{MN_HOMEDIV_C} AND MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_URL NOT LIKE '/dyAdmin/admin%'
SELECT * FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MN_URL LIKE '/dyAdmin/homepage%'
